title: On the maximal normal prime-nilpotent subgroup of a prime-solvable group
author_string: Gagen, Terence M., Hale, Mark P.
journal: Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society
abstract: A characterization of the maximal normal p-nilpotent subgroup of a finite p-solvable group is obtained for primes p ≠ 2 or 3.
